channel.title: Absolute Software — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Absolute Software (absolute).

item.title: CVE-2026-55399 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Resource exhaustion vulnerability in the Secure Access publisher
item.description: CVE-2026-55399 is a resource exhaustion vulnerability in the Secure Access publisher prior to 14.55. Attackers with valid credentials to the Secure Access tunnel can create a non-persistent DoS against the publisher.

item.title: CVE-2026-55398 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Memory management vulnerability in Secure Access clients
item.description: CVE-2026-55398 is a memory management vulnerability in Secure Access clients and servers prior to 14.55. Attackers with intimate knowledge of and total control over the tunnel protocol can create a non-persistent DoS against the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-33445 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory management vulnerability in Secure Access servers
item.description: CVE-2026-33445 is a memory management vulnerability in Secure Access servers prior to 14.55. Attackers with an intimate knowledge of and total control over the tunnel protocol can create a persistent DoS against the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-33444 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Memory management vulnerability in Secure Access servers
item.description: CVE-2026-33444 is a memory management vulnerability in Secure Access servers prior to 14.55. Attackers with intimate knowledge of and total control over the tunnel protocol can create a non-persistent DoS against the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-33443 · 7.1 HIGH — Memory management error in Secure Access servers prior to 14.55
item.description: CVE-2026-33443 is a memory management error in Secure Access servers prior to 14.55. Attackers with an intimate knowledge of and total control over the tunnel protocol can create a persistent DoS against the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-40958 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Input validation error in Secure Access clients prior to 14.55
item.description: CVE-2026-40958 is a input validation error in Secure Access clients prior to 14.55. Attackers with intimate knowledge of and total control over the tunnel protocol can create a non-persistent DoS against their client.

item.title: CVE-2026-40957 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Frameable content vulnerability in the Secure Access server login page
item.description: o CVE-2026-40957 is a frameable content vulnerability in the Secure Access server login page prior to 14.55. Attackers with control of a malicious web site could use it to potentially steal credentials from an unwary administrator.

item.title: CVE-2026-40956 · 2.1 LOW 🌩️ — Memory disclosure in Secure Access Clients
item.description: CVE-2026-40956 is a memory disclosure vulnerability in Secure Access client versions prior to 14.55. Attackers with intimate knowledge of and total control over the tunnel protocol can cause a small amount of random memory to leak.

item.title: CVE-2026-40955 · 2.1 LOW 🌩️ — Integer underflow vulnerability in Secure Access clients
item.description: CVE-2026-40955 is an integer underflow vulnerability in the traffic parsing function of Secure Access clients prior to 14.55. Attackers with intimate knowledge of and total control over the tunnel protocol can create a non-persistent DoS against thei…

item.title: CVE-2026-40954 · 2.1 LOW 🌩️ — Integer underflow in Secure Access clients prior to 14.55
item.description: CVE-2026-40954 is an integer underflow vulnerability in the traffic parsing function of Secure Access clients prior to 14.55. Attackers with intimate knowledge of and total control over the tunnel protocol can create a non-persistent DoS against thei…

item.title: CVE-2026-40953 · 6.7 MEDIUM — Heap overflow in Secure Access clients
item.description: CVE-2026-40953 is a heap overflow in the certificate parsing function of Secure Access clients prior to 14.55. Attackers with local access and administrator permissions can create a denial of service attack against the client over which they have con…

item.title: CVE-2026-40952 · 8.5 HIGH — Privilge misconfiguration in Secure Access installers
item.description: CVE-2026-40952 is a privilege misconfiguration in the Secure Access installer for the Windows client and server prior to version 14.55. Attackers with local access to the client or server can use it to elevate privileges to Administrator when Secure…

item.title: CVE-2026-40951 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Memory corruption in Secure Access Windows clients prior to 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-40951 is a memory corruption vulnerability on Secure Access Windows clients prior to 14.50. Attackers with local control of the Windows client can send malformed data to an API and trigger a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-40950 · 7.1 HIGH — Buffer overflow in the Secure Access server prior to 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-40950 is a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Secure Access server prior to 14.50. Attackers with control of a modified client can send a specially crafted message to the server and cause a denial of service

item.title: CVE-2026-40949 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Buffer overflow in Windows clients prior to 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-40949 is a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Secure Access Windows client prior to 14.50. Attackers with local control of the Windows client can use it to trigger a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-33452 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Buffer overflow in Windows clients prior to 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-33452 is a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Secure Access Windows client prior to 14.50. Attackers with local control of the Windows client can use it to ‘blue screen’ the system.

item.title: CVE-2026-33451 · 8.5 HIGH — Arbitrary read/write vulnerability in Windows clients prior to 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-33451 is an arbitrary read/write vulnerability in the Secure Access Windows client prior to 14.50. Attackers with local control of the Windows client can send malformed data to an API and elevate their level of privilege to system.

item.title: CVE-2026-33450 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Out of bounds read in Secure Access MacOS clients prior to 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-33450 is an out of bounds read vulnerability in the Secure Access MacOS client prior to 14.50. Attackers with control of a modified server can send a malformed packet to the client causing a denial of service.

item.title: CVE-2026-33449 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Message handler buffer overflow in clients prior to 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-33449 is a buffer overflow in a message handling function of the Secure Access client prior to 14.50. Attackers with control of a modified server can send a cryptographically valid message to the client, overwriting a small portion of memory…

item.title: CVE-2026-33448 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Format string vulnerability in MacOS clients prior to 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-33448 is a format string vulnerability in the logging subsystem of Secure Access client for MacOS prior to 14.50. Attackers with control of a modified server can force the client to dump the contents of a small portion of memory to the log f…

item.title: CVE-2026-33447 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️
item.description: CVE-2026-33447 is a buffer overflow in a message parsing function of the Secure Access client prior to 14.50. Attackers with control of a modified server can send a special packet that can overwrite a small portion of memory conceivably leading to me…

item.title: CVE-2026-33446 · 2.3 LOW 🌩️ — Buffer overflow in client authentication prior to version 14.50
item.description: CVE-2026-33446 is a buffer overflow in the authentication sub-system of the Secure Access client prior to 14.50. Attackers with control of a modified server can send a special packet that can overwrite a small portion of memory conceivably leading to…

item.title: CVE-2026-0519 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Information Disclosure in Secure Access Between 12.70 and 14.20
item.description: In Secure Access 12.70 and prior to 14.20, the logging subsystem may write an unredacted authentication token to logs under certain configurations. Any party with access to those logs could read the token and reuse it to access an integrated system.

item.title: CVE-2026-0518 · 4.8 MEDIUM — XSS in Secure Access Consoles prior to 14.20
item.description: CVE-2026-0518 is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in versions of Secure Access prior to 14.20. An attacker with administrative privileges can interfere with another administrator’s use of the console.

item.title: CVE-2026-0517 · 6 MEDIUM — Denial of Service in Secure Access Servers Prior to 14.20.
item.description: CVE-2026-0517 is a denial-of-service vulnerability in versions of Secure Access Server prior to 14.20. An attacker can send a specially crafted packet to a server and cause the server to crash

item.title: CVE-2025-59596 · 6 MEDIUM
item.description: CVE-2025-59596 is a denial-of-service vulnerability in Secure Access Windows client versions 12.0 to 14.10 that is addressed in version 14.12. If a local networking policy is active, attackers on an adjacent network may be able to send a crafted pack…

item.title: CVE-2025-59595 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: CVE-2025-59595 is an internally discovered denial of service vulnerability in versions of Secure Access prior to 14.12. An attacker can send a specially crafted packet to a server in a non-default configuration and cause the server to crash.

item.title: CVE-2025-54089 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in Secure Access prior to 14.10
item.description: CVE-2025-54089 is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in versions of secure access prior to 14.10. Attackers with administrative access to the console can interfere with another administrator’s access to the console. The attack complexity is low; th…

item.title: CVE-2025-54088 · 5.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Open Redirect in Secure Access prior to 14.10
item.description: CVE-2025-54088 is an open-redirect vulnerability in Secure Access prior to version 14.10. Attackers with access to the console can redirect victims to an arbitrary URL. The attack complexity is low, attack requirements are present, no privileges are…

item.title: CVE-2025-54087 · 1.8 LOW — Server-side request forgery in Secure Access
item.description: CVE-2025-54087 is a server-side request forgery vulnerability in Secure Access prior to version 14.10. Attackers with administrative privileges can publish a crafted test HTTP request originating from the Secure Access server. The attack complexity i…

item.title: CVE-2025-54086 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Excess Permissions in Warehouse
item.description: CVE-2025-54086 is an excess permissions vulnerability in the Warehouse component of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 14.10. Attackers with access to the local file system can read the Java keystore file. The attack complexity is low, there are…

item.title: CVE-2025-49082 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Permissions bypass vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.56
item.description: CVE-2025-49082 is a vulnerability in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.56. Attackers with administrative access to the console and who have been assigned a certain set of permissions can bypass those permissions to…

item.title: CVE-2025-54085 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Elevation of privilege vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.56
item.description: CVE-2025-54085 is a vulnerability in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.56. Attackers with administrative access to the console and who have been assigned a certain set of permissions can bypass those permissions to…

item.title: CVE-2025-49084 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Elevation of privilege vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.56
item.description: CVE-2025-49084 is a vulnerability in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.56. Attackers with administrative access can overwrite policy rules without the requisite permissions. The attack complexity is low, attack requ…

item.title: CVE-2025-49083 · 7 HIGH — Data deserialization vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.56
item.description: CVE-2025-49083 is a vulnerability in the management console of Absolute Secure Access after version 12.00 and prior to version 13.56. Attackers with administrative access to the console can cause unsafe content to be deserialized and executed in the…

item.title: CVE-2025-49081 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Input validation vulnerability in the Secure Access prior to version 13.55
item.description: There is an insufficient input validation vulnerability in the warehouse component of Absolute Secure Access prior to server version 13.55. Attackers with system administrator permissions can impair the availability of the Secure Access administrativ…

item.title: CVE-2025-49080 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Memory management vulnerability in Absolute Secure Access server versions 9.0 to 13.54
item.description: There is a memory management vulnerability in Absolute Secure Access server versions 9.0 to 13.54. Attackers with network access to the server can cause a Denial of Service by sending a specially crafted sequence of packets to the server. The attack…

item.title: CVE-2025-27706 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.54
item.description: CVE-2025-27706 is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.54. Attackers with system administrator permissions can interfere with another system administrator’s use of the management…

item.title: CVE-2025-27703 · 7 HIGH — Privilege escalation in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.54
item.description: CVE-2025-27703 is a privilege escalation vulnerability in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.54. Attackers with administrative access to a specific subset of privileged features in the console can elevate their permi…

item.title: CVE-2025-27702 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Permissions bypass in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.54
item.description: CVE-2025-27702 is a vulnerability in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.54. Attackers with administrative access to the console and who have been assigned a certain set of permissions can bypass those permissions to…

item.title: CVE-2024-6364 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Server Identity Validation Bypass in Absolute Persistence®
item.description: A vulnerability in Absolute Persistence® versions before 2.8 exists when it is not activated. This may allow a skilled attacker with both physical access to the device, and full hostile network control, to initiate OS commands on the device. To remed…

item.title: CVE-2025-27705 · 5.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: There is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.53. Attackers with system administrator permissions can interfere with another system administrator’s use of the m…

item.title: CVE-2025-27704 · 5.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: There is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.53. Attackers with system administrator permissions can interfere with another system administrator’s use of the m…

item.title: CVE-2024-40875 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console prior to 13.52
item.description: There is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the management console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.52. Attackers with system administrator permissions can interfere with another system administrator’s use of the management console…

item.title: CVE-2024-40873 · 4.5 MEDIUM — XSS in Secure Access administrative console
item.description: There is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Secure Access administrative console of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.07. Attackers with system administrator permissions can interfere with another system administrator’s use of the p…

item.title: CVE-2024-40872 · 8.4 HIGH — Elevation of privilege in Absolute Secure Access clients and servers
item.description: There is an elevation of privilege vulnerability in server and client components of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.07. Attackers with local access and valid desktop user credentials can elevate their privilege to system level by passing i…

item.title: CVE-2024-37352 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Absolute Secure Access administrative console prior to 13.06
item.description: There is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the management UI of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.06 that allows attackers with system administrator permissions to interfere with other system administrators’ use of the management UI wh…

item.title: CVE-2024-37351 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Absolute Secure Access administrative console prior to 13.06
item.description: There is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the management UI of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.06. Attackers with system administrator permissions can interfere with other system administrator’s use of the management UI when the sec…

item.title: CVE-2024-37350 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Absolute Secure Access administrative console prior to 13.06
item.description: There is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the policy management UI of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.06. Attackers can interfere with a system administrator’s use of the policy management UI when the attacker convinces the victim a…

item.title: CVE-2024-37349 · 4.5 MEDIUM — Cross-site scripting vulnerability in the Absolute Secure Access administrative console prior to 13.06
item.description: There is a cross-site scripting vulnerability in the management UI of Absolute Secure Access prior to version 13.06. Attackers with system administrator permissions can interfere with other system administrator’s use of the management UI when the vic…
